label: Layout thing
description: A ThingDef with an offset position and rotation used in GenStep_ScatterLayout.

thing.label: Thing
thing.description: ThingDef to spawn at the offset position.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Cell offset from the scatter center where this thing is placed. Serialized as (x, y, z).

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: Rotation of the placed thing as an integer (0=North, 1=East, 2=South, 3=West).

filthDef.label: Filth def
filthDef.description: Filth ThingDef spawned around this thing after placement.

filthExpandBy.label: Filth expand by
filthExpandBy.description: Number of cells to expand the occupied rect when spawning filth.

filthChance.label: Filth chance
filthChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each eligible cell around this thing receives filth.
